basic_details.job_title: DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Data Entry Operator, Counsellor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Counsellor / PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher / Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit (DCPU Guntur) has published the Counsellor, PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher, and Data Entry Operator Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 contractual positions. Candidates aged between 18 and 42 years and holding the prescribed educational qualifications are eligible to apply offline. The application process will remain open until 23-07-2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology / Public Health / Counselling, PG Diploma in Counselling and Communication, Degree / Diploma in Physical Educational Training, 12th pass with Diploma / Certificate in Computers
qualification.details: Counsellor: Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology / Public Health / Counselling from a recognized university. (OR) PG Diploma in Counselling and Communication. PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher: Degree / Diploma in Physical Educational Training. Data Entry Operator: 12th pass from a recognized Board / equivalent board with Diploma / Certificate in Computers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Guntur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Guntur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Guntur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Counsellor: Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology / Public Health / Counselling from a recognized university. (OR) PG Diploma in Counselling and Communication. PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher: Degree / Diploma in Physical Educational Training. Data Entry Operator: 12th pass from a recognized Board / equivalent board with Diploma / Certificate in Computers.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Guntur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Counsellor, PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher, and Data Entry Operator in the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the DCPU Guntur posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: For the Data Entry Operator post, candidates must have passed the 12th grade from a recognized board and possess a Diploma or Certificate in Computers.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026. Applications are free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the DCPU Guntur posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Guntur posts will be based on Merit and Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The posts announced under the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the contract agreement.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains all detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary offered for the DCPU Guntur posts?
faq.answer: The salary details for the posts of Counsellor, PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher, and Data Entry Operator are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for salary information.
